zh.lifeSummary: 當George Way於1553年出生在英國多瑟特阿林頓時，他的父親Henry Alexander Way23歲，母親Mary Joanna Gallop20歲。他於1580年6月13日與Agnes Symes在英國英格蘭多瑟特包維爾斯托可結婚。他去世於1587年4月在英國享年34歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特包維爾斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: Way
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly southern): topographic name for someone who lived near a road or path, from Middle English wei (Old English weg, cognate with Old Norse vegr, Old High German weg), or a habitational name from some minor place called with this word, as for example any of the places called Way or Waye in Devon or Way in Somerset and Kent.

variants.name: Wei
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ming, Wei, Li, Chao, Hong, Cheng, Jin, Ling, Ping, Yuan, Bin, Dong, Lan, Min, Chang, Chong, Chung, Houa, Pai, Sha, Yiming.

Mandarin form of the surname 魏, a term referring to ‘the buildings at either side of the gates of the royal palace’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Wei (魏), originally the name of a fief (located in Ruicheng in Shanxi province) granted to Bi Wan, an official in the state of Jin. In 403  BC , the state of Jin was split into three, one of which was the state of Wei (魏), established by Wei Huan Zi (魏桓子). After this state was annexed by the state of Qin in 225  BC , its name was adopted by some people as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Mi (羋) by Wei Ran (魏冉), an official who lived in the state of Qin during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ). (iii) borne by descendants of Wei Liao Weng (魏了翁), a scholar during the Southern Song dynasty (1127–1279  AD ), who changed his original name Gao (高) to his uncle's surname Wei (魏).

variants.name: Wey
meanings: English (Dorset and Somerset): variant of   Way  .
Dutch: variant, mostly archaic or Americanized, of Weij, a topographic name from weide ‘pasture, meadow’ (compare Vanderweide ).
German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names based on the element wīg ‘battle’ (compare Weyers ). This surname is also found in Belgium.

variants.name: Waye
meanings: English (Devon and Kent): variant of   Way  .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When George Way was born in 1553, in Allington, Dorset, England, his father, Henry Alexander Way, was 23 and his mother, Mary Joanna Gallop, was 20. He married Agnes Symes on 13 June 1580, in Powerstock, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. He died in April 1587, in England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Powerstock, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Way est né en 1553, à Allington, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Henry Alexander Way, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mary Joanna Gallop, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Symes le 13 juin 1580, à Powerstock, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en avril 1587, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Powerstock, Dorset, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: George Wayが1553年にイギリスドールセトアリントンで生まれた時，父Henry Alexander Wayは23歳，母Mary Joanna Gallopは20歳であった。1580年6月13日にイギリスイギリスドールセトポウエルストックでAgnes Symesと結婚した。彼は1587年4月にイギリスで34歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトポウエルストックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Way(이)가 1553년 영국 도르세트 앨링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Alexander Way(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Joanna Gallop(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1580년 6월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 파워스톡에서 Agnes Symes(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1587년 4월 영국에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 파워스톡에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Way родился в 1553 г. в местности аллингтон, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Alexander Way было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Joanna Gallop, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Symes 13 июня 1580 г. в местности павэрстокк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер апрель 1587 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности павэрстокк, дорсет, Англия.
